hollyshorts-21.description: Art directed the 21st anniversary festival. Poster, merch, badges, award design, and full production design across the festival, Alta Global Media Film Summit, and award show.

comedy-rebrand.description: Led the full rebrand — new logo, color palette, typography, design system, AR activations, website, and event production.

hollyshorts-london.description: Creative direction and design for the inaugural HollyShorts London. New visual identity for the festival's international expansion.

dont-mind-me.title: Don't Mind Me
dont-mind-me.description: First feature-length film score. Full soundtrack for the feature. The career milestone — shorts to features.

hollyshorts-20.location: TCL Chinese · Egyptian Theater · Japan House, Los Angeles
hollyshorts-20.description: Three venues. Original illustration. Award design. A full merch line. Production design for the festival, film summit, and award show. Press in Variety, Deadline, and Daily Mail.

cannes-2024.description: Original illustrations and poster design for Kodak-hosted events at the 2024 Cannes Film Festival.

nice-knives.description: Designed the poster and composed the score. Two disciplines, one film. Directed by Connor Copeland, distributed by BAM In Motion.

hollyshorts-19.description: Art direction and lead design for the 19th annual festival. Developed the look-and-feel alongside the executive team.

cannes-2023.description: Original artwork and invitation design for HollyShorts events at Cannes.

hdtracks.description: Complete rebranding and website redesign for the Grammy-connected music platform. UX/UI, branding, logos, ad campaigns.

alchemy.description: Score and music supervision for the award-winning documentary directed by Remington Long. 10+ festival awards including Sundance Collab and Hamptons.

boys-will-be-flowers.description: Film score for the short directed by Daddy Ramazani. Featured on NOWNESS. Official Selection at Le Festival International du Film sur l'Art.
